case_title: JON FOUGNER VS. CLICK TWO MARKETING LIMITED

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY FOUGNER, JON AS TO DEFENDANT CLICK TWO MARKETING LIMITED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-07-2016 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 250.00 SERVED JAN-11-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CLICK TWO MARKETING LIMITED
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-08-2017 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 8/31/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-07-2016 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY & DEFECTIVE SERVICE TO MAY-08-2017 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JON FOUGNER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT CLICK TWO MARKETING LIMITED. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE IS BOTH UNTIMELY & DEFECTIVE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
